meta.tagline: Carmel NY inpatient + 3 NYC-metro outpatient · Liberation Programs Inc.
meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: Carmel Map Pack dominated · Queens top-3 pushable · Bronx data gap · service-page form missing · 3-of-4 GBPs pending access · insurance-article cluster 214K imp at <0.5% CTR.

tldr: Arms Acres' Inpatient Carmel pin is dominating Putnam County across 169 grid cells and scan-over-scan is still improving: drug rehab top-3 +10 cells (101→111), alcohol rehab near me +8 (115→123), detox center near me +2 (128→130). 100% top-20 coverage on the 3 high-intent queries. Carmel OP co-ranks at #2 alongside Inpatient at #1 across the Carmel-branded grid — but does NOT appear in top-20 on the generic queries Inpatient solo-dominates. Queens OP holds 100% top-20 / 93-95% top-10 / 12-25% top-3 across its 169-cell grid. Bronx OP has no grid baseline (data gap, M1 setup). The lift now comes from 5 structural moves: deploy the service-page intake form (24K sessions/365d → 0 conv because no form, +480-720 conv potential at 2-3% rate); close GBP profile-depth gap on 3 of 4 unmanaged pins (Queens 33-char vs Ascendant 750-char description); CTR-lift the 10-article insurance cluster ranking 11-20 (214K imp/180d at <0.5% CTR → projected ~14× at top-3 CTR); ship /alcohol-rehab-new-york + /detox-new-york NY-state pages; and deploy LocalBusiness + Service + FAQPage schema across Tier-1 surfaces (currently Organization on homepage only).

kpis.label: Inpatient Carmel grid coverage (3 high-intent kws)
kpis.detail: 169-cell grid, monthly cadence at 41.587, -73.908. drug rehab top-3 +10 cells Jan→Apr (101→111). alcohol rehab near me top-3 +8 (115→123). detox center near me top-3 +2 (128→130). Median rank 2-8. Dominating + improving on the revenue-engine pin.

kpis.label: Carmel OP rank on generic queries
kpis.detail: Carmel OP co-ranks at #2 across 169 cells on Carmel-branded queries (carmel recovery · carmel new york rehab · carmel methadone clinic) — but does NOT appear in top-20 on drug rehab / alcohol rehab near me / detox center near me / rehab. Access opportunity: push Carmel OP onto the same generic queries Inpatient already owns.

kpis.label: Service-page conversion mechanism
kpis.detail: 24,000 sessions/365d on /service/* + /inpatient/* + /outpatient/* produce 0 form-conversions because there's no form on the page — only a Call Now button. At 2-3% form-completion rates, this is +480 to +720 annual conversions left on the table vs the entire portfolio's current 531/yr baseline.

kpis.label: GBP manager access (4 pins)
kpis.detail: HQDM has manager access only to Inpatient Carmel (75 Seminary Hill Rd). Carmel OP (21 Old Rte 6) + Bronx OP (3584 Jerome Ave) + Queens OP (90-02 161st St) are AA-managed. Queens description = 33 chars vs Ascendant 750. 41 staged tasks blocked in Pending CSV.

kpis.label: Insurance-article CTR-lift cluster
kpis.detail: 10 insurance / payor / cost articles ranking 11-20 with 214K combined impressions / 180d at <0.5% CTR. Top-3 average CTR ≈ 30%. Title + FAQ-schema rewrites on already-ranking pages = projected ~14× clicks at top-3 average CTR (~17K clicks vs ~1.2K today).

kpis.label: Schema coverage (Tier-1 pages)
kpis.detail: Organization schema on homepage only. Zero JSON-LD on 3 outpatient location pages + /inpatient/adult-rehabilitation + /inpatient/detox-program + every /service/* (12 URLs incl 4 near-dupes). Closes rich-result eligibility + AI-Overview / LLM citation surface gap.

trend.headline: GA4 — sessions + leads + engagement, 18 months. Leads = form_submit (organic last 90d: 20). Phone / Email / GMB clicks shown separately as intent signals.
trend.annotation_text: GA4 default-channel-grouping. Leads counted as form_submit events only. Phone CTA clicks and GMB→site sessions are intent signals — shown in the Engagement panel below. Jan–Feb 2025 sessions read as ~0 because of a GA4 instrumentation gap, not a traffic event — compare like-for-like from Mar 2025 forward.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — actual through May 27 (no run-rate projection).

engagement_signals.headline: Engagement intent signals (clicks + Maps→site)
engagement_signals.annotation_text: Intent signals, not confirmed conversions. Counts include clicks that may not result in a call or visit.

gmb.label: GMB → site sessions
gmb.caption: Sessions tagged ?utm_source=gmb — the live Maps→site path.

leads_definition.caption: Leads = form_submit event only. Phone / Email / GMB clicks are intent signals, shown separately.

positives: Inpatient Carmel dominating AND improving — 169-cell grid, 100% top-20 on 3 high-intent queries, scan-over-scan top-3 deltas all positive (drug rehab +10, alcohol rehab near me +8, detox center near me +2)
Carmel-branded queries owned across 169 cells — both AA pins co-rank at #1 and #2 on carmel recovery / carmel new york rehab / carmel methadone clinic
Queens OP grid 100% top-20 + 93-95% top-10 — visibility is solved, the lever is converting more top-10 cells into top-3 (currently 12-25%)
Insurance article cluster ranking 11-20 with 214K imp/180d at <0.5% CTR — top-3 CTR target ≈ 30% projects ~14× click lift on already-ranking pages (title + FAQ-schema work only)
First-mover GBP Q&A opportunity — 0 owner-answered Q&As across the entire local SUD competitive set (Ascendant 13/0, Cornerstone 27/0). 40 owner-answered at ~3 hrs of work puts AA 5× ahead
17,209 backlinks / 426 ref domains — 2.5× any direct competitor. Link gap is quality not volume
armsacres.com homepage clicks growing month-over-month — 26→208 weekly clicks Jan→Apr (12% of GSC clicks come from /?utm_source=gmb GBP referral)
Liberation Programs Inc. 50-year operating history + statewide multi-pin footprint = baseline E-E-A-T strength competitors lack
negatives: Service-page form is MISSING — 24K sessions/365d on /service/* + /inpatient/* + /outpatient/* convert at 0% because Call Now button only (+480 to +720 annual conv potential lost)
GBP manager access on 3 of 4 pins (Carmel OP + Bronx OP + Queens OP) — Queens description = 33 chars vs Ascendant 750-char · 41 staged tasks blocked in Pending CSV
Bronx OP grid baseline does not exist — no LD coverage at 3584 Jerome Ave / Norwood. Any 'invisible in Bronx' claim before LG-INF-01 setup is unsupported
Wrong-brand homepage og:description LIVE: 'Bold Steps Behavioral Health is the best drug rehab in Harrisburg PA' — every social share renders this until CP-02 ships
Schema deployment is bare — Organization on homepage only. Zero JSON-LD on /service/* + /inpatient/* + /outpatient/*. AI-Overview / LLM citation surface gap
71 templated /suburb/* doorway pages + 4 city-modifier /service/* near-duplicates (39% body overlap) — internal cannibalization + thin-content trust-quality risk
GBP photo + description starvation on 3 unmanaged pins — Carmel OP 2/201 chars · Bronx OP 1/314 chars · Queens OP 2/33 chars (vs Ascendant 90/750)
Inpatient 36.8% one-star content density + Queens 62.5% one-star — both below the 4-star LLM-citation threshold (Gemini + ChatGPT filter at 4.0★). Intake-side review SOP is the structural fix
Missing CARF citation — 3 of 3 direct competitors have carf.org (highest-trust SUD signal + AI Overview citation source). CARF status verification gated on AA compliance

levers.name: Service-page conversion + Tier-1 page improvements
levers.why: 24K sessions/365d on /service/* + /inpatient/* + /outpatient/* convert at 0% because there's no form — only a Call Now button. At 2-3% form-completion this is +480 to +720 annual conversions vs the entire portfolio's 531/yr baseline. /inpatient parent already captures 77K imp/365d at pos 5.6 — top-3 push delivers ~10× the click base. Homepage og:description renders wrong-brand boilerplate ('Bold Steps Behavioral Health... Harrisburg PA') on every social share.

actions.name: Service-page CTA + tracking audit → 4-input form-deploy recommendation memo (24K sess × 2-3% rate)
Rewrite homepage og:description + meta — replace 'Bold Steps Harrisburg PA' wrong-brand boilerplate
Improve /inpatient PARENT page — insurance-by-name + Medicaid prominent + FAQ schema (77K imp/365d at pos 5.6)
Ship /alcohol-rehab-new-york NY-state-level page (880-vol cluster, 3-competitor consensus)
Ship /detox-new-york NY-state-level page (260-vol cluster, 3-competitor consensus)
Insurance-carrier anchored sections on /admissions (Aetna · Medicare · Medicaid · Tricare · Cigna · BCBS)

levers.outcome: +480 to +720 annual conversions from service-page form. /inpatient parent reaches top-3 within 60-90d at 77K imp/365d. 2 net-new NY-state pages indexed and ranking. Homepage social-share preview no longer renders wrong-brand text.

levers.name: Insurance + payor article CTR-lift cluster
levers.why: 10 insurance / payor / cost articles ranking pos 11-20 with 214K combined imp/180d at <0.5% CTR. Top-3 average CTR ≈ 30% projects ~14× clicks (~17K vs ~1.2K today) on already-ranking pages. Title rewrites + FAQ schema first (M1 lowest-effort), contextual content + interlinks second (M2), measurement third (M3). Highest-leverage commercial-intent surface AA already has. Paired with CP-01 service-page form, the new traffic converts.

actions.name: Insurance article batch — 5 articles title + meta + FAQ schema (insurance-cover-rehab · how-to-get-insurance-to-pay-for-inpatient-rehab · medicare · tricare · aetna)
Insurance article batch — 2026 stats + payor FAQ block + 3-5 contextual internal links per article
Insurance article batch — M3 measurement + amplification or diagnosis flag
Already-ranking blog batch — 3 title-only (percocet-overview 40K imp at 0.10% CTR + ambien + xanax) + 2 content-update (alcohol-recovery-statistics + cost-without-insurance)
M3 supporting articles — 3 NEW tied to /alcohol-rehab-new-york + /detox-new-york + /inpatient/adult-rehabilitation

levers.outcome: 5 insurance articles reach top-5 average position within 90d. ~14× click lift on already-ranking pages. CN-01 batch validated, M3 measurement informs Q3 scaling. Tier-1 NY-state pages have supporting article cluster on M3 ship.

levers.name: GBP base optimization — Inpatient Carmel managed pin (defend + extend)
levers.why: Inpatient Carmel is the only AA pin with manager access. It's also dominating + improving on the high-intent grid (3 of 4 queries scan-over-scan positive). Defend posture only — don't apply spam-pattern signals to a winning pin. Description refresh (536→750 chars) + categories (5→7) + attributes (2→6) + Q&A (25/0 owner-answered → 40+ with site-URL anchors) + Posts (10→34) + ExifTool on existing 9 photos = full-stack signal lift on the managed surface.

actions.name: GBP description refresh — 536→750 chars (insurance carriers + MAT + dual-dx + Hudson Valley)
GBP services-list completion — 7+ items, each linked to /inpatient/* or /service/* page
GBP category expansion — 5→7 (add Detox center + Counselor)
GBP attribute completion — 2→6 (accessibility + service_options + amenities + payments)
GBP Posts cadence — 24 posts across M1-M3 with site-page links + ExifTool image injection
Owner-reply to all <4-star reviews (~49 negative on Inpatient at 36.8% one-star density)
GBP Q&A — answer 25 existing + seed 10-15 more (first-mover: zero competitor owner-answered)
ExifTool keyword-injection + re-upload existing 9 photos (vs Ascendant 90 photos)

levers.outcome: GBP signal completeness (description + services + categories + attributes + Q&A + Posts + photo metadata) reaches competitor parity within 60d on the managed pin. Inpatient Carmel grid coverage holds + extends into mid-funnel substance-specific queries (rehab pos 14.5 → top-10).

levers.name: Site architecture cleanup + Bronx LD grid setup + measurement
levers.why: 71 templated /suburb/* doorway pages + 4 city-modifier /service/* near-duplicates (39% body overlap) are an internal-cannibalization + thin-content trust-quality risk. Surfpoint AUDIT-back pattern (don't blanket-NOINDEX) preserves 348 clicks / 127K imp / 365d. Schema bare on Tier-1 surfaces. Bronx LD grid is the missing 4th grid — without measurement we can't size Bronx work or claim 'invisible in Bronx'. SP-04 Queens map-widget shows Carmel address (signals wrong city to Maps users).

actions.name: Audit + fix + expand /outpatient/queens-outpatient — map widget shows Carmel addr (P0 fix) + neighborhood enumeration + LocalBusiness schema
Audit + fix + expand /outpatient/bronx-outpatient — same pattern (Fordham + Williamsbridge + Norwood + Tremont)
Service-page ↔ GBP services-list gap audit + Q3 page-build plan (IOP + dual-dx + family therapy candidates)
/suburb/* audit + per-URL bucketing (71 URLs · KEEP / AUDIT / NOINDEX)
/suburb/* improvement cohort — first 10 highest-traffic thin pages
/suburb/* improvement cohort — next 10 thin pages
De-duplicate 4 /service/<x>-in-carmel-hamlet-ny near-duplicate pairs (equine + fitness + MAT + psychiatric)
Schema deployment — LocalBusiness + Service + FAQPage on Tier-1 pages (homepage Organization only today)
LD grid setup — Bronx OP (3584 Jerome Ave) 169-cell weekly, 4-week baseline by M2 close
Maps SERP re-pull at Bronx + Queens coords — M3 passive measurement vs M1 baseline
LD coverage analysis + per-pin per-cluster delta report (3-grid setup: Queens + Inpatient + Bronx)

levers.outcome: Queens + Bronx OP location pages match table-stakes bar (NAP correct + neighborhoods + schema). 20 /suburb/* pages improved (preserve 348 click base). 4 service-page near-duplicates canonicalized. Schema rich-result eligibility on ≥80% of touched URLs. Bronx grid baseline established. Q2 framework decision input ready for Q3 planning.

levers.name: Off-page — citations + disavow + local PR (SEO NEO stack REMOVED)
levers.why: Per 2026-05-13 off-page program halt: SEO Neo / DAS / GBP Blast / GBP Sniper / RD100 / AI Articles / NAP-overlay / GMB-pin-creation stack REMOVED. Replaced with: (1) citation buildout per HQDM Citation SOP — 15 citations across foundational gov + vertical SUD directories + local NY (M1/M2/M3 batches of 5); (2) disavow file for 17K backlinks / 504 RDs / spam 19 (pure-spam-pattern only, AA-side GSC upload); (3) local PR + Hudson Valley editorial pitches (Hudson Valley Magazine + Press-Republican + Times Union); (4) carf.org + startyourrecovery.org + behavioralhealthnews.org placements gated on Owner Conversation verification (CARF + 501c3 + clinical roster); (5) Driving Directions program at Bronx + Queens remains Tier-0 separate decision per Owner Item 13.

actions.name: Citation buildout — foundational + gov (SAMHSA + OASAS + startyourrecovery + psychologytoday + AA-specific gap)
Citation buildout — vertical SUD directories (alcoholism + best-rehabs + rehab.com + addictionresource + rehabspot)
Citation buildout — local NY + recovery community (Putnam County + Carmel + Dutchess/Westchester + NYC HRA + NAMI Hudson Valley)
Pitch contributed article to behavioralhealthnews.org (Hudson Valley SUD trends 2026 byline, 4-6 week lead M2→M3)
Psychology Today profile audit + completion (4 facilities + clinician roster)
Linkable asset concept v1 — 3 concept briefs for Q3 commission
Disavow review + spam-domain cleanup (17K BLs / 504 RDs / spam 19 → pure-spam-pattern .txt for AA-side upload)
Local PR + Hudson Valley press placement (HV Mag / Press-Republican / Poughkeepsie Journal / Times Union pitches)

levers.outcome: 15 net-new citation surfaces (gov + vertical + local). 1+ editorial placement (behavioralhealthnews + Hudson Valley PR). Disavow staged for AA-side upload. CARF + 501c3 citations live conditional on Owner Conversation verification. Q3 link-acquisition queue ready.

levers.name: Reporting + reviews-velocity + Q2 close-out
levers.why: Recovery accounts strategy framework requires planned → executed → impact correlation. Marija's MoM Summary '% Reports With Full Correlation' = the metric Phase 1 rollout is judged against. Reviews velocity = the only structural fix for Queens 2.2★ / 62.5% one-star + Inpatient 36.8% one-star (both below the 4★ LLM-citation threshold). Intake-side SOP gated on Owner Conversation Item 9.

actions.name: Q2 close-out report — planned → executed → impact (every task → action → outcome metric for Marija's Phase-1 evaluation)

levers.outcome: Single client-facing close-out report shipped with every row populated (Result/Notes + Evidence). Phase 1 strategy-first model validated.

owner_asks: GBP manager access on Carmel OP + Bronx OP + Queens OP — add info@hqdm.io as Manager on the 3 unmanaged pins (Single biggest Q2 unlock — activates ~41 staged tasks in Pending CSV)

CARF accreditation status — confirm whether Arms Acres is currently CARF-accredited (3 of 3 direct competitors have carf.org citation; highest-trust SUD signal + AI Overview citation source). If yes → supply credentials for listing claim.
501(c)(3) status + EIN — confirm Liberation Programs Inc operates as 501(c)(3); unlocks charitynavigator.org (3 competitors have it)
LegitScript verification — confirm certified yes/no (gates any Q3+ paid acquisition; no immediate organic impact)
MICA / dual-diagnosis residential program confirmation — which facility serves Mentally Ill / Chemical Abusers (30/mo cluster, 2-competitor gap, gates /mica-program M3 page)
OTP / MAT license status per facility — which facilities can dispense methadone vs Suboxone-only (gates /medication-assisted-treatment or /opioid-treatment-program page, 40/mo cluster)
Residential mental health licensure confirmation (90/mo cluster, 2-competitor gap)

Clinical roster + named-clinician approval — clinical lead name + credentials + bio + photo (with release) gates behavioralhealthnews byline + E-E-A-T block + Counselor/Psychiatrist/Psychologist GBP categories
GBP photo intake commitment — 25 photos × 4 locations = 100 total OR photographer commission (~$2,500 for 3 NYC-metro + Carmel; stock/AI imagery NOT viable on a clinical SUD brand)

Intake-side review-request SOP — front-desk + discharge team commits to SMS + QR card + verbal ask (target +20 reviews on Inpatient + +10 on Queens by M1 close; Queens 2.2★ blocks LLM citation eligibility)

Insurance carrier list — authoritative current list per facility with logos AA is brand-approved to use (powers M2 article batch + /admissions M3 sub-sections; HQDM cannot promise carriers AA doesn't actually take)
Disavow file approval + GSC upload — AA-side approval to upload HQDM-prepared disavow.txt (M2 start; spam score 19 moderate, no acute risk but cleanup measurable in M3 Backlinks re-pull)
Schema deployment sign-off — Webflow access path + internal QC owner for M3 sitewide deployment (LocalBusiness + Service + FAQPage)

Driving Directions Tier-0 decision — AA + Milica + Aleksandar joint review for Q3 Bronx/Queens deployment (Orlando regression-window flag: peak rank 3.44 → 7.54 ~8 weeks post-completion. Defer to M3 — let M1/M2 conventional GBP work establish Maps baseline first)

gsc_organic_trend.headline: Stable Carmel-anchored organic with Apr-May 2026 inflection — homepage + insurance-article cluster gaining, blog informational cohort facing AIO pullback
gsc_organic_trend.annotation_text: Source: GSC Search Analytics 365d daily window aggregated to month. Homepage at pos 17 with 1.7K clicks / 482K imp 365d. Insurance article cluster (10 articles) at pos 11-20 with 214K imp/180d — title + FAQ-schema CN-01 batch is the M1 CTR lever. May 2026 partial (first 14 days at trailing pace).

snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · Carmel NY + NYC-metro · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: Arms Acres' Inpatient Carmel pin dominates Putnam County — 100% top-20 coverage across the high-intent searches and still improving scan over scan (drug-rehab +10 cells, alcohol-rehab-near-me +8). The gap is mechanical: HQDM has manager access to only one of four Google Business pins. The plan fixes the service-page conversion path, lifts insurance and payor content, and optimizes the managed Carmel pin.
snapshot.boxes_reading_html: Organic traffic and Maps visibility are the clean signals this quarter. The current month is partial.

competitors.title: Competitor Movement · Maps
competitors.note_html: You're #1 in the market (692 top-3 cells, +17). Your own Carmel Outpatient pin co-ranks just behind it; the nearest outside competitor (Cornerstone) sits well back. Lower avg rank is better.
